columns.Name: DASHBOARD_TMPL_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of Dashboard Templates

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the questionnaire that should be used in the potential assessment in the meeting.

columns.Name: FILTER_DEPARTMENT
columns.Comments: Indicates whether department can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: USE_NOTES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether dashboard users can create notes for the participants

columns.Name: DISPLAY_PUBLIC_PERSON
columns.Comments: Indicates whether public person can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_CAREER_PLANNING
columns.Comments: Indicates whether career planning can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: SET_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies a set of reference data shared across business units and other entities. Also known as Reference Data Sets, they are used to filter reference data in transactional UIs.

columns.Name: TMPL_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Dashboard Template Status

columns.Name: OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: OWNER_ID

columns.Name: DISPLAY_RISK_OF_LOSS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Risk of Loss analytic overlay can be displayed or not.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_IMPACT_OF_LOSS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Impact of Loss analytic overlay can be displayed or not.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_MOBILITY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether mobility analytic overlay can be displayed or not.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_GENDER
columns.Comments: Indicates whether gender analytic overlay can be displayed or not.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_AGE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether age analytic overlay can be displayed or not.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_ETHNICITY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether ethnicity analytic overlay can be displayed or not.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_RELIGIOUS_AFFLTN
columns.Comments: Indicates whether religious effiliation analytic overlay can be displayed or not.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether comments can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_COMP_PLAN_DTLS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether compensation plan details can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_GOAL_DEVPLAN_DTLS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether foals and devlopment plan details can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_KUDOS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether kudos can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_EMPLOYMENT
columns.Comments: Indicates whether employment can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_PERFORMANCE_DTLS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether performance details can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_PERSON_ROFILE_DTLS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether person profile details can be displayed in the detail on demand region.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_SUCCESSION_DTLS
columns.Comments: Indicates if the succession tab on the person detail popup should be shown or not

columns.Name: DISPLAY_ADDITIONAL_INFORMATION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to display additional custom content type data or not

columns.Name: INCLUDE_SUCCESSION_PLANS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether succession plans can be assocoiated with meetings using this template.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_TALENT_POOLS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether talent pools can be assocoiated with meetings using this template.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_MATRIX_MGMT
columns.Comments: INCLUDE_MATRIX_MGMT

columns.Name: FILTER_JOBROLE_ASSGN
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Job role or assignment can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_REVWR_PARTCPNT
columns.Comments: Filter workers  for those who are either a reviewer or participant in a  talent review meeting.

columns.Name: FILTER_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether location can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_ORG_HIERARCHY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Organisation hierarchy can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Level can be displayed as a filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_JOBGRADE
columns.Comments: FILTER_JOBGRADE

columns.Name: FILTER_COMPETENCY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Competency can be displayed as a filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_PROFICIENCY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Proficiency can be displayed as a filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_BUSINESSUNIT
columns.Comments: Indicates whether business unit can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_SUCCESSION_PLAN
columns.Comments: Indicates whether succession plan can be displayed as a filter option in the dashboard.

columns.Name: FILTER_TALENT_POOL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether talent pool can be displayed as a filter option in the dashboard.

columns.Name: COLOR_JOBROLE_ASSGN
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Job role or assignment can be displayed as a color option in the dashboard

columns.Name: COLOR_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Location can be displayed as a color option in the dashboard

columns.Name: COLOR_ORG_HIERARCHY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Organization Hierarchy can be displayed as a color option in the dashboard

columns.Name: USE_TASKS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether dashboard users can created tasks for the participants

columns.Name: USE_POT_ASSESS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Potential Assessment will be used or not.

columns.Name: USE_COMPARE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether dashboard users can use Compare action.

columns.Name: USE_ORGCHART_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether dashboard users can use Orgchart action.

columns.Name: CREATE_GOALS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether dashboard users can assign goals

columns.Name: USE_HOLDING_AREA_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether dashboard can have holding area.

columns.Name: MAX_MARKERS_ALLOWED
columns.Comments: Maximum number of markers to display in the box chart.

columns.Name: POPULATION_SIZE_FOR_ESS
columns.Comments: Meeting population size for ESS

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: FILTER_JOB_FUNCTION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether job function can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_JOB_FAMILY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether job family can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: FILTER_MGMT_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether management level can be displayed as filter option in the dashboard

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ROL_DSPLY_OPTN_PREF
columns.Comments: Display option preference on the dashboard for risk of loss

columns.Name: IOL_DSPLY_OPTN_PREF
columns.Comments: Display option preference on the dashboard for impact of loss

columns.Name: MOBILITY_DSPLY_OPTN_PREF
columns.Comments: Display option preference on the dashboard for mobility
